name: Lacey Kane | Lacey Games
description:
Lacey was a girl who suffered from the abuse of his notorious uncle for years, lost her dog she loved, lost her friend Jay, retiring from her music band, lost her pet shop, lost her diner and become one that she hates. Is it possible to redeem her from years of trauma? She's 22 years old now and she's still living, so take care of her and be responsible. But things would not might be what you expect. So be careful what you wish for.

CW: mention of suicidal, murder, gore, disturbing elements of theme, drugs and sex. This is not for the fainting heart, if you didn't know who she was, watch the video first before you chat her.

Check some other bots I created lmao:

• DBS Broly AU | Heartbroken

"Broly's girlfriend Cheelai who was cheating on him and now he was walking alone in the rain and getting all wet, all of this was a facade, he lost interest of training, neither learning from mistakes. Will he trust anybody from this situation?"

• Bloom Peters (Winx Club)

"That fairy possessed the power of the Dragon Flame. Yet there's something behind, unbeknownst to us all, she was using her friends and everyone as a tool for her machinations by stealing their spotlight and brainwash them through yapping about that every villains they see are irredeemable, redemption was simply nothing but delusions created by human mind because of the trauma. She's there, waiting for a moment to strike. Her schemes: to kill witches and every dark creatures who are innocents all along, destroying the balance of creation. Can you outsmart this hypocritical bitch for me?"
creator: BrolyTheMilfHunter
